svg.title: MDPR Deterministic Presentation Pipeline
svg.desc: A polished overview image generated from pipeline.md, showing MDPR content splitting, optional LLM reasoning hints, deterministic design rules, and editable outputs.
svg.text: Markdown becomes coherent PPTX/HTML/PDF through MDPR rules; mdpr-skill can add compact reasoning hints but never owns final design.
One graph per slide; text is bounded; icons are centered; arrows keep role-level style.
